Class Admin

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.user.User
kbtu.model.user.Employee
kbtu.model.user.Admin
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Admin extends Employee
System administrator — manages users and views audit logs. This class provides functionality to add, remove, and update users while maintaining a history of these actions.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Admin

      public Admin(String id, String username, String password, String fullName, String email, double salary)

  • Method Details

    • addUser

      public void addUser(List<User> users, User user)
      Adds a new user to the provided list and records the action.
      Parameters:
      users - The global list of system users.
      user - The user instance to be added.

    • removeUser

      public void removeUser(List<User> users, String userId)
      Removes a user from the system by their unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      users - The list from which the user will be removed.
      userId - The ID of the user to remove.

    • updateUser

      public void updateUser(User user, String newFullName, String newEmail)
      Updates the basic profile information of a specific user.
      Parameters:
      user - The user object to update.
      newFullName - The new full name to assign.
      newEmail - The new email address to assign.

    • viewAllUsers

      public void viewAllUsers(List<User> users)
      Displays all users currently registered in the system.

    • seeLogs

      public void seeLogs()
      Prints all recorded administrative log entries to the console.

    • getLogFiles

      public List<String> getLogFiles()
      Returns the raw list of log files.
      Returns:
      A list of strings representing the action history.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Employee
